name: Blender Action: Bake Animation
description: Creates a Blender action to bake object/pose animation using bpy.ops.nla.bake. Bakes all selected objects over the given frame range, sampling every frame_step frames.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]

    def _get(key, default):
        v = inputs.get(key)
        return v if v is not None else self.get_parameter(key, default)

    action = {
        'type': 'bake_animation',
        'frame_start': int(_get('frame_start', 1)),
        'frame_end': int(_get('frame_end', 100)),
        'frame_step': int(_get('frame_step', 1)),
        'only_selected': bool(_get('only_selected', True)),
        'visual_keying': bool(_get('visual_keying', True)),
        'clear_constraints': bool(_get('clear_constraints', False)),
    }
    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added bake_animation action (frames {action["frame_start"]}-{action["frame_end"]} step {action["frame_step"]})')
    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
